meta_description: An overview of editorial work across INTHEBLACK, RSL Victoria, EnergyQuest, Niche Media, Moody's Analytics and The Sunday Times.
hero_lead: A working list rather than a highlight reel. Some of it is public and linkable, some of it is the quieter kind of editing that never has a byline.
closing_text: [Working on something that needs an editor? Get in touch →](contact.html)
